text.title: API-First Development Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply API-First Development end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: scope
step.action: Identify the resources, methods, and security model needed.

step.name: draft-spec
step.action: Fill OpenAPI 3.1 YAML: info, servers, paths, schemas, security.

step.name: lint
step.action: Run spectral lint; group violations into block / warn / defer.

step.name: mock
step.action: Start Prism mock server; share URL with consumer team.

step.name: implement
step.action: Generate stubs; implement handlers; keep generated code untouched.

step.name: contract-test
step.action: Run Dredd or Pact; fail on contract drift.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Run bump diff; produce final artefact JSON; owner signs.
